data.title: $79B surge in Memecoin market indicates limited investment options. Neiro rep sees memecoins as appealing, but Xion CEO criticizes impact on crypto image.
data.description: The community lead of Neiro, identified as S, hailed memecoins as the most captivating sector within the cryptocurrency industry. In contrast, Anthony Anzalone, the CEO of Xion, argued that memecoins are tarnishing the reputation of the entire crypto market.

data.title: Together AI accelerates inference speed with NVIDIA's Blackwell GPUs, achieving world's fastest DeepSeek-R1-0528 model with NVIDIA HGX B200 for real-world AI applications.
data.description: Together AI has revealed the latest breakthrough in AI technology, achieving the fastest inference speed for the DeepSeek-R1-0528 model by leveraging the NVIDIA HGX B200 system. This advancement significantly boosts AI capabilities for practical and real-world applications. The impressive performance improvements will undoubtedly revolutionize AI processing, with the model now outperforming any previous benchmarks. This development marks a significant milestone in the field of artificial intelligence, setting a new standard for speed and efficiency.

data.title: Iceland Seafood's subsidiary to acquire 2 freezer trawlers ENTRENA UNO & ENTRENA DOS with permits for USD 5.8 million.
data.description: THORPESCA S.A.S., a recently formed Argentine branch of Iceland Seafood Ibérica, has accepted an offer from FOOD ARTS S.A. to acquire two freezer fishing vessels, ENTRENA UNO and ENTRENA DOS, along with their fishing permits and historical rights. The acquisition comes at a total cost of USD 5.8 million.

data.title: Unchained Summit to return to Dubai on Oct 30-31, 2025, organized by Aeternum, bringing together global blockchain stakeholders.
data.description: Dubai, UAE - The Unchained Summit, a prominent event in the global blockchain industry, will be held in Dubai on October 30-31 after its successful first edition. Aeternum is responsible for organizing the summit that brings together stakeholders from around the world. The event serves as a pivotal platform for discussing blockchain technology, and its significance for various sectors.

data.title: Earnings report for July 18, 2025: • Charles Schwab: $1.08/share, $5.67B revenue • 3M: $2.01/share, $6.08B revenue • Huntington Bancshares: $0.36/share, $1.98B revenue
data.description: Before the market opening, several companies are expected to report their quarterly earnings. Charles Schwab (NYSE: SCHW) is estimated to announce earnings of $1.08 per share with revenue reaching $5.67 billion. Meanwhile, 3M (NYSE: MMM) is projected to report earnings of $2.01 per share with revenue of $6.08 billion. Huntington Bancshares (NASDAQ: HBAN) is anticipated to reveal earnings of $0.36 per share on revenue totaling $1.98 billion. American Express (NYSE: AXP) is also set to report its quarterly earnings. For further details, visit Benzinga.com.
